scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:collector" "npm run dev:analysis" "npm run dev:alerts" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm -w shared run build && npm -w client run build && npm -w server/api-gateway run build && npm -w server/data-collector run build && npm -w server/analysis-engine run build && npm -w server/alert-service run build
scripts.test: npm -w shared run test && npm -w server/analysis-engine run test && npm -w server/data-collector run test && npm -w server/alert-service run test && npm -w client run test
scripts.test:coverage: npm -w shared run test -- --coverage && npm -w server/analysis-engine run test -- --coverage && npm -w server/data-collector run test -- --coverage && npm -w server/alert-service run test -- --coverage && npm -w server/api-gateway run test -- --coverage && npm -w client run test -- --coverage
